closed_reason: Crate structure exists with lib.rs, rlm_attr.rs, attrs.rs, generators/
description: Create crates/rlm-derive in DSRs workspace with Cargo.toml (proc-macro crate), lib.rs skeleton with rlm_type attribute macro and RlmType derive macro exports, rlm_attr.rs for struct rewriting. Add to workspace Cargo.toml. Dependencies: proc-macro2, quote, syn (full,parsing,extra-traits), darling.

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Plan (dsrs-rlmrig-plan.md Task 1.1): scaffold `crates/rlm-derive` as proc-macro crate.
Files to create:
- `crates/rlm-derive/Cargo.toml` (proc-macro=true; deps: proc-macro2, quote, syn(full/parsing/extra-traits), darling)
- `crates/rlm-derive/src/lib.rs` exporting `#[rlm_type]` attribute macro + `#[derive(RlmType)]`
- `crates/rlm-derive/src/rlm_attr.rs` for struct rewriting
Workspace: add `crates/rlm-derive` (and `crates/rlm-core`) to top-level `Cargo.toml` members.

title: Task 1.1: Create rlm-derive crate structure
